title: Cordless Handheld Car Vacuum & Air Blower – Mini Powerful 12000Pa Suction, Portable Small Hoover, HEPA, Accessories for Interior, PC, Home & Kitchen
features: Dual-Mode Suction for Every Mess: Choose between 6,000 Pa (first gear) for light debris or 12,000 Pa (second gear) for stubborn dirt—ideal for car crumbs, sofa fibers, rug lint, or keyboard dust.
Wireless Freedom, Reliable Runtime: Built-in 4,000 mAh rechargeable battery runs ~20 minutes (low) / ~15 minutes (high) on a full 4-hour charge. No cords, no limits — clean car interiors, desktops.
Blower & Dusting Functionality: Flip to the rear blowing nozzle mode to act as a portable air duster — perfect for vents, keyboards, balloons, or light dust removal.
Accessory-Rich Kit for Tight Spaces: Includes gap filler, crevice tool, brush nozzle, and extension tube to reach between car seats, dashboards, cup holders, and narrow voids.
Washable HEPA Filter & Hassle-Free Maintenance: Removable HEPA filter catches fine particles and is washable for reuse. Easy-release dust bin ensures quick cleanups without dust clouds.
